tldr_artifact: 4pc Ocean-Hued Clam (healer) / 4pc Tenacity of the Millelith (support)
tldr_key_stats: HP 35K+ · ER 160-180% · Healing Bonus circlet · E > Q
intro: Sangonomiya Kokomi is a 5-star Hydro Catalyst healer who combines sustained off-field Hydro application with massive team-wide healing. Her Elemental Skill (Kurage's Oath) provides AoE Hydro application and healing every 2 seconds, while her Burst refreshes the skill duration and enhances her normal attacks. Kokomi is the premier comfort pick for Freeze and Bloom teams — she consolidates the healer and Hydro applicator roles into one slot, freeing your team for more damage. While often underestimated, she's one of the most versatile and valuable supports in the game.
weapon_bottom_line: Everlasting Moonglow provides HP and Healing Bonus, but Prototype Amber R5 is nearly as good and free. Thrilling Tales of Dragon Slayers R5 is a strong support option that buffs your main DPS.

weapons.name: Everlasting Moonglow
weapons.notes: Signature. HP substat + Healing Bonus + Normal ATK DMG based on HP. Best for on-field Kokomi.

weapons.name: Prototype Amber R5
weapons.notes: Best F2P. HP substat + team energy refund on Burst. At R5, nearly matches Moonglow for healing.

weapons.name: Thrilling Tales of Dragon Slayers R5
weapons.notes: Support option. R5 gives 48% ATK to next character. Ideal for freeze support Kokomi.

weapons.name: Sacrificial Fragments
weapons.notes: Bloom team option. EM substat + skill reset for continuous jellyfish uptime.

artifact_why: Best for healer Kokomi. Converts healing into physical AoE damage (up to 27K per bubble). Kokomi's consistent healing maxes the bubble easily.
artifact_alt: 4pc Tenacity of the Millelith — full support build. 20% ATK buff for team + shield strength. Use when Kokomi is purely off-field.

main_stats.sands_note: HP% for healing. ER% sands if below 160% ER and not using Prototype Amber.
main_stats.goblet_note: Hydro DMG for on-field Burst mode. HP% for pure healing.
main_stats.circlet_note: Healing Bonus maximizes both healing and Clam bubble damage. HP% is a budget option.

sub_priority: 3. Elemental Mastery — only for Bloom/Nilou teams

teams.name: Ayaka Freeze
teams.desc: Premium freeze team. Kokomi provides 100% uptime AoE Hydro with her jellyfish. Consolidates healer + Hydro slot. Kazuha groups + buffs Cryo DMG.

teams.name: Nilou Bloom
teams.desc: Kokomi is the best driver for Nilou Bloom. Her healing offsets self-damage from blooms. Full EM build for maximum bloom damage.

teams.name: Taser Driver
teams.desc: On-field Kokomi drives Electro-Charged. Clam set provides additional AoE damage. Very comfortable and safe team.

rotation_code: Shenhe E+Q (Cryo buff) → Kazuha E+Q (Cryo swirl + group) → Kokomi E (jellyfish, Hydro apply) → Ayaka dash + E + Q → Ayaka NA/CA spam → Refresh Kokomi E with Q before it expires
rotation_key: Use Kokomi's Q right before the jellyfish expires to refresh its duration. In freeze teams, prioritize jellyfish uptime over personal damage.
mistakes: Building ATK/Crit on healer Kokomi — her passive gives -100% CR. She cannot crit. HP and Healing Bonus are the only stats that matter.
Not refreshing jellyfish — Kokomi's E has 12s duration, 20s cooldown. Use Q to refresh before it expires for 100% uptime.
Using HP goblet over Hydro DMG in on-field teams — during Burst, Kokomi's normal attacks deal significant damage with Hydro goblet.
Ignoring ER — without Prototype Amber or sufficient ER, Kokomi cannot Burst to refresh her jellyfish.

seo.title: Kokomi Build Guide — Best Weapons, Artifacts, Teams | GenshinGuide
seo.description: Complete Kokomi build guide for Genshin Impact v5.6. Best weapons ranked (Everlasting Moonglow, Prototype Amber), optimal artifacts (Ocean-Hued Clam, Tenacity), Freeze and Bloom team compositions, rotation guide, and common mistakes.
